# AgentJam 创意展示 HTML

这是 TRAE AI 创造力大赛项目 **AgentJam——在 Minecraft 里多人协作的 AI 编程空间** 的展示页。

## 在线预览

- GitHub Pages: https://lavine888.github.io/AgentJAM-showcase/
- 单文件 HTML: [`agentjam-showcase-single.html`](./agentjam-showcase-single.html)
- Pages 入口文件: [`index.html`](./index.html)

## 使用说明

- 如果只是在线展示，直接使用 GitHub Pages 链接。
- 如果帖子平台支持上传 HTML 附件，可以上传 `agentjam-showcase-single.html`。
- `agentjam-showcase-single.html` 已经把字体资源内嵌进去，不依赖 `_shared` 文件夹。

## HTML 源码

下面是单文件 HTML 的完整源码，复制后保存为 `agentjam-showcase-single.html` 即可在浏览器打开。

```html
<!-- Generated by Trae Work -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>AgentJam｜单文件展示页｜在 Minecraft 里多人协作的 AI 编程空间</title>
  <style>
    @font-face {
      font-family: "Pixelify";
      src: url("data:font/ttf;base64,") format("truetype");
      font-weight: 500;
      font-style: normal;
      font-display: swap;
    }

    @font-face {
      font-family: "Outfit";
      src: url("data:font/ttf;base64,") format("truetype");
      font-weight: 400;
      font-style: normal;
      font-display: swap;
    }

    @font-face {
      font-family: "Outfit";
      src: url("data:font/ttf;base64,") format("truetype");
      font-weight: 700;
      font-style: normal;
      font-display: swap;
    }

    @font-face {
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono";
      src: url("data:font/ttf;base64,") format("truetype");
      font-weight: 400;
      font-style: normal;
      font-display: swap;
    }

    :root {
      --bg: #07110f;
      --bg2: #0e211d;
      --ink: #effff4;
      --muted: #a6c8b7;
      --rule: #28483d;
      --accent: #79ff8f;
      --accent2: #52d8ff;
      --shadow: #020605;
      --warm: #ffd166;
      --danger: #ff6b6b;
      --cube-dark: #0b1815;
      --cube-mid: #173329;
      --cube-lit: #1f4b39;
      --grass: #5fc64b;
      --dirt: #8a5a32;
      --stone: #788079;
      --ore: #3de7ff;
      --portal: #9b5cff;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      min-height: 100vh;
      color: var(--ink);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 18% 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 18%, transparent), transparent 27rem),
        radial-gradient(circle at 88% 16%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, transparent), transparent 24rem),
        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg), var(--shadow));
      font-family: "Outfit", system-ui, sans-serif;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0.22;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 22%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 16%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 44px 44px;
      mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--bg), transparent 78%);
      z-index: -2;
    }

    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        linear-gradient(transparent 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 20%, transparent) 50%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 16%, transparent) 50%);
      background-size: 4px 4px;
      opacity: 0.18;
      z-index: -1;
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
    }

    .page {
      width: min(1180px, calc(100% - 40px));
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .hero {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.02fr 0.98fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 3rem;
      padding: 4rem 0 3rem;
    }

    .hero::before,
    .hero::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      pointer-events: none;
      image-rendering: pixelated;
    }

    .hero::before {
      left: -3rem;
      bottom: 4rem;
      width: 86px;
      height: 86px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(var(--grass) 0 26%, transparent 26%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 75%, var(--shadow)) 0 18%, transparent 18% 32%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 92%, var(--shadow)) 32% 50%, transparent 50% 64%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 70%, var(--warm)) 64% 82%, transparent 82%),
        var(--dirt);
      box-shadow:
        86px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 82%, var(--shadow)),
        172px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 88%, var(--shadow)),
        258px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 62%, var(--dirt)),
        344px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 72%, var(--bg2));
      opacity: 0.45;
    }

    .hero::after {
      right: -2.5rem;
      top: 5.5rem;
      width: 72px;
      height: 72px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 21%, var(--ore) 21% 36%, transparent 36% 64%, var(--ore) 64% 79%, transparent 79%),
        linear-gradient(color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 88%, var(--shadow)), color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 62%, var(--shadow)));
      box-shadow:
        -76px 76px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 78%, var(--shadow)),
        -152px 152px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 86%, var(--shadow));
      opacity: 0.56;
    }

    .badge {
      width: fit-content;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.55rem;
      padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 10%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 42%, transparent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 24px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, transparent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .badge::before {
      content: "";
      width: 0.62rem;
      height: 0.62rem;
      background: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px var(--accent);
    }

    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    .logo {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }

    h1 {
      margin-top: 1.25rem;
      font-family: "Pixelify", "Outfit", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(4.2rem, 10vw, 8.8rem);
      line-height: 0.86;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      text-shadow:
        0 4px 0 var(--cube-lit),
        0 10px 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 34%, transparent);
    }

    .subtitle {
      margin: 1.35rem 0 0;
      max-width: 620px;
      color: var(--ink);
      font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 2.2vw, 1.65rem);
      line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .subtitle strong,
    mark.key {
      color: var(--accent);
      background: none;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .summary {
      margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
      max-width: 640px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1rem;
    }

    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.85rem;
      margin-top: 2rem;
    }

    .minecraft-hud {
      display: grid;
      gap: 0.65rem;
      margin-top: 1.4rem;
      max-width: 570px;
    }

    .status-row {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
    }

    .hearts,
    .hunger {
      display: inline-flex;
      gap: 0.18rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    }

    .hearts span {
      color: var(--danger);
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger) 56%, transparent);
    }

    .hunger span {
      color: var(--warm);
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px color-mix(in srgb, var(--warm) 42%, transparent);
    }

    .hotbar {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(9, minmax(34px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.28rem;
      width: min(100%, 520px);
      padding: 0.35rem;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 68%, transparent);
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 70%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 10%, transparent);
    }

    .slot {
      min-height: 42px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--ink);
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 28%, var(--shadow));
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 16%, transparent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.05;
    }

    .slot.active {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 38%, transparent);
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 18%, var(--shadow));
    }

    .pill {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      text-decoration: none;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 84%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 4%, transparent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
    }

    .pill.primary {
      color: var(--bg);
      background: var(--accent);
      border-color: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 32%, transparent);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .room-wrap {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 620px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      perspective: 1200px;
    }

    .room {
      position: relative;
      width: min(100%, 580px);
      height: 500px;
      transform: rotateX(58deg) rotateZ(-38deg);
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 36px 46px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 82%, transparent));
    }

    .floor {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 46%, transparent) 8% 10%, transparent 10% 38%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 40%, transparent) 38% 40%, transparent 40%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 18%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 38%, transparent) 18% 20%, transparent 20% 66%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 34%, transparent) 66% 68%, transparent 68%),
        linear-gradient(45deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 11%, transparent) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 11%, transparent) 75%),
        linear-gradient(45deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 10%, transparent) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 10%, transparent) 75%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cube-mid), var(--cube-dark));
      background-position: 0 0, 0 0, 0 0, 24px 24px, 0 0;
      background-size: 96px 96px, 96px 96px, 48px 48px, 48px 48px, auto;
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 44%, transparent);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 5%, transparent),
        inset 0 0 60px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 10%, transparent);
    }

    .wall {
      position: absolute;
      left: 145px;
      top: 88px;
      width: 290px;
      height: 160px;
      transform: translateZ(92px);
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 31%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 28%, transparent) 32%, transparent 33%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 31%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 22%, transparent) 32%, transparent 33%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 86%, transparent);
      background-size: 44px 44px;
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 46%, transparent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 24%, transparent);
    }

    .wall::before {
      content: "PROJECT WALL · REDSTONE SYNC";
      position: absolute;
      top: 12px;
      left: 14px;
      color: var(--accent2);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      transform: rotateZ(38deg) rotateX(-58deg);
      transform-origin: left top;
    }

    .screen {
      position: absolute;
      width: 78px;
      height: 48px;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 66%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 22px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 30%, transparent);
    }

    .screen::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 9px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent) 0 34%, transparent 34% 100%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent2) 0 58%, transparent 58% 100%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--warm) 0 44%, transparent 44% 100%);
      background-size: 100% 5px;
      background-position: 0 0, 0 13px, 0 26px;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
      opacity: 0.85;
    }

    .screen.a {
      top: 52px;
      left: 35px;
    }

    .screen.b {
      top: 52px;
      right: 35px;
      border-color: var(--accent2);
    }

    .screen.c {
      bottom: 28px;
      left: 106px;
      border-color: var(--warm);
    }

    .station {
      position: absolute;
      width: 96px;
      height: 82px;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transform: translateZ(42px);
    }

    .station::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 82%, var(--shadow)) 0 12%, transparent 12% 88%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 72%, var(--shadow)) 88%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 74%, var(--shadow)) 0 12%, transparent 12% 88%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 70%, var(--shadow)) 88%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cube-lit), var(--cube-mid));
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 28%, transparent);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 18%, transparent);
    }

    .station::after {
      content: attr(data-agent);
      position: absolute;
      left: 14px;
      top: 16px;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      transform: rotateZ(38deg) rotateX(-58deg);
      transform-origin: left top;
      white-space: nowrap;
      text-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--accent);
    }

    .station.one {
      left: 74px;
      bottom: 74px;
    }

    .station.two {
      right: 78px;
      bottom: 92px;
    }

    .station.three {
      left: 248px;
      bottom: 34px;
    }

    .avatar {
      position: absolute;
      width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      transform: translateZ(94px);
      background: var(--accent2);
      border: 2px solid var(--ink);
      box-shadow: 0 0 22px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 42%, transparent);
    }

    .avatar::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 7px;
      top: -26px;
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      background: var(--warm);
      border: 2px solid var(--ink);
    }

    .avatar.v1 {
      left: 105px;
      bottom: 170px;
    }

    .avatar.v2 {
      right: 118px;
      bottom: 184px;
      background: var(--accent);
    }

    .avatar.v3 {
      left: 288px;
      bottom: 130px;
      background: var(--danger);
    }

    .beam {
      position: absolute;
      height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--accent), transparent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px var(--accent);
      transform-origin: left center;
      opacity: 0.8;
    }

    .beam.b1 {
      width: 225px;
      left: 142px;
      bottom: 185px;
      transform: translateZ(88px) rotateZ(-24deg);
    }

    .beam.b2 {
      width: 188px;
      right: 158px;
      bottom: 194px;
      transform: translateZ(88px) rotateZ(30deg);
    }

    .beam.b3 {
      width: 130px;
      left: 300px;
      bottom: 148px;
      transform: translateZ(88px) rotateZ(-72deg);
    }

    .crafting-table,
    .portal-frame,
    .ore-block,
    .creeper {
      position: absolute;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transform: translateZ(56px);
    }

    .crafting-table {
      left: 392px;
      bottom: 54px;
      width: 54px;
      height: 54px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 20% 24%, transparent 24% 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 48% 52%, transparent 52% 76%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 76% 80%, transparent 80%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 20% 24%, transparent 24% 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 48% 52%, transparent 52% 76%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 76% 80%, transparent 80%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 78%, var(--warm));
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--warm) 55%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--warm) 18%, transparent);
    }

    .crafting-table::after {
      content: "CRAFT";
      position: absolute;
      top: 16px;
      left: 8px;
      color: var(--warm);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.58rem;
      transform: rotateZ(38deg) rotateX(-58deg);
    }

    .portal-frame {
      left: 26px;
      top: 126px;
      width: 70px;
      height: 96px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 85%, var(--portal)) 0 20%, transparent 20% 80%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 85%, var(--portal)) 80%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 85%, var(--portal)) 0 16%, transparent 16% 84%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 85%, var(--portal)) 84%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--portal) 70%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 24%, transparent) 48%, transparent 52%);
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--portal) 50%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow: 0 0 34px color-mix(in srgb, var(--portal) 48%, transparent);
    }

    .ore-block {
      right: 38px;
      top: 284px;
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 18%, var(--ore) 18% 30%, transparent 30% 58%, var(--ore) 58% 72%, transparent 72%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 16%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ore) 84%, var(--ink)) 16% 28%, transparent 28% 60%, var(--ore) 60% 74%, transparent 74%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 72%, var(--shadow));
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 78%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow: 0 0 22px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ore) 36%, transparent);
    }

    .creeper {
      right: 22px;
      bottom: 188px;
      width: 40px;
      height: 64px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 20%, var(--shadow) 20% 35%, transparent 35% 65%, var(--shadow) 65% 80%, transparent 80%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 32%, var(--shadow) 32% 50%, transparent 50% 64%, var(--shadow) 64% 78%, transparent 78%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 86%, var(--accent));
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 55%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 24%, transparent);
    }

    .creeper::after {
      content: "conflict?";
      position: absolute;
      left: 24px;
      top: -22px;
      color: var(--danger);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      transform: rotateZ(38deg) rotateX(-58deg);
      white-space: nowrap;
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--danger);
    }

    .floating-terminal {
      position: absolute;
      right: 0;
      bottom: 56px;
      width: min(330px, 90%);
      padding: 1rem;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 78%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, transparent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 18%, transparent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .floating-terminal span {
      color: var(--accent);
    }

    .section {
      padding: 5rem 0;
      border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--rule) 76%, transparent);
    }

    .section-head {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.68fr 1fr;
      gap: 2rem;
      align-items: end;
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
      color: var(--accent2);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    h2 {
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 4.2rem);
      line-height: 1.02;
    }

    .section-head p {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1.04rem;
    }

    .grid {
      display: grid;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .grid.cols-3 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    }

    .grid.cols-4 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    }

    .grid.cols-2 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }

    .card {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100%;
      padding: 1.25rem;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 5%, transparent), transparent),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 86%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 4%, transparent),
        0 16px 40px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 30%, transparent);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .card::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      right: -28px;
      top: -28px;
      width: 72px;
      height: 72px;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 18%, transparent);
      box-shadow:
        -18px 18px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 12%, transparent),
        -36px 36px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--warm) 10%, transparent);
    }

    .card h3 {
      position: relative;
      margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }

    .card p {
      position: relative;
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.96rem;
    }

    .pain-card {
      border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger) 42%, var(--rule));
    }

    .pain-card h3 {
      color: var(--danger);
    }

    .mc-element {
      padding-left: 5rem;
    }

    .mc-element .block-icon {
      position: absolute;
      left: 1.25rem;
      top: 1.3rem;
      width: 46px;
      height: 46px;
      image-rendering: pixelated;
      border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 15%, transparent);
      box-shadow:
        8px 8px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 42%, transparent),
        inset 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 6%, transparent);
    }

    .block-icon.grass {
      background:
        linear-gradient(var(--grass) 0 28%, transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 80%, var(--shadow)) 0 20%, transparent 20% 42%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 92%, var(--warm)) 42% 62%, transparent 62% 80%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 70%, var(--shadow)) 80%),
        var(--dirt);
    }

    .block-icon.redstone {
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 44%, var(--danger) 44% 56%, transparent 56%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 44%, var(--danger) 44% 56%, transparent 56%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 72%, var(--shadow));
      box-shadow:
        8px 8px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 42%, transparent),
        0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger) 38%, transparent);
    }

    .block-icon.diamond {
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 18%, var(--ore) 18% 34%, transparent 34% 66%, var(--ore) 66% 82%, transparent 82%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ore) 80%, var(--ink)) 20% 34%, transparent 34% 62%, var(--ore) 62% 76%, transparent 76%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--stone) 72%, var(--shadow));
    }

    .block-icon.portal {
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--portal), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 22%, transparent) 52%, transparent 55%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 84%, var(--portal)) 0 18%, transparent 18% 82%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 84%, var(--portal)) 82%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 84%, var(--portal)) 0 18%, transparent 18% 82%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 84%, var(--portal)) 82%);
    }

    .block-icon.creeper-face {
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 18%, var(--shadow) 18% 35%, transparent 35% 65%, var(--shadow) 65% 82%, transparent 82%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 34%, var(--shadow) 34% 50%, transparent 50% 65%, var(--shadow) 65% 82%, transparent 82%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--grass) 86%, var(--accent));
    }

    .block-icon.craft {
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 20% 24%, transparent 24% 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 48% 52%, transparent 52% 76%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 76% 80%, transparent 80%),
        linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 20% 24%, transparent 24% 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 48% 52%, transparent 52% 76%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 54%, transparent) 76% 80%, transparent 80%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--dirt) 78%, var(--warm));
    }

    .solution-band {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr;
      gap: 1.2rem;
      align-items: stretch;
    }

    .statement {
      padding: 2rem;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 16%, transparent), transparent 40%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 88%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 42%, transparent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 42px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 12%, transparent);
    }

    .statement p {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 3.2vw, 2.45rem);
      line-height: 1.18;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    }

    .mini-map {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 340px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(45deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 9%, transparent) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 9%, transparent) 75%),
        linear-gradient(45deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 8%, transparent) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 8%, transparent) 75%),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 90%, transparent);
      background-position: 0 0, 18px 18px, 0 0;
      background-size: 36px 36px, 36px 36px, auto;
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .mini-map .node {
      position: absolute;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: 92px;
      height: 72px;
      color: var(--ink);
      background: var(--cube-mid);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 38%, transparent);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      text-align: center;
      box-shadow: 0 0 26px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, transparent);
    }

    .mini-map .node.center {
      left: calc(50% - 62px);
      top: calc(50% - 44px);
      width: 124px;
      height: 88px;
      color: var(--bg);
      background: var(--accent);
      border-color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .mini-map .node.n1 {
      left: 9%;
      top: 12%;
    }

    .mini-map .node.n2 {
      right: 10%;
      top: 15%;
    }

    .mini-map .node.n3 {
      left: 13%;
      bottom: 13%;
    }

    .mini-map .node.n4 {
      right: 13%;
      bottom: 12%;
    }

    .line {
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: 50%;
      width: 190px;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--accent2), transparent);
      transform-origin: left center;
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px var(--accent2);
    }

    .line.l1 {
      transform: rotate(210deg);
    }

    .line.l2 {
      transform: rotate(330deg);
    }

    .line.l3 {
      transform: rotate(148deg);
    }

    .line.l4 {
      transform: rotate(31deg);
    }

    .flow {
      counter-reset: step;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
      gap: 0.85rem;
    }

    .step {
      position: relative;
      padding: 1.15rem;
      min-height: 180px;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 88%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    }

    .step::before {
      counter-increment: step;
      content: "0" counter(step);
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-family: "Pixelify", monospace;
      font-size: 2rem;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .step h3 {
      font-size: 1.02rem;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .step p {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    .feature {
      padding-top: 4.2rem;
    }

    .feature .icon {
      position: absolute;
      top: 1.1rem;
      left: 1.2rem;
      width: 2.15rem;
      height: 2.15rem;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--bg);
      background: var(--accent);
      font-family: "Pixelify", monospace;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      box-shadow:
        0.45rem 0.45rem 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 45%, transparent),
        0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 26%, transparent);
    }

    .audience-card {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 1rem;
      min-height: 260px;
    }

    .audience-card .top {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.8rem;
    }

    .avatar-block {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      background: var(--accent2);
      box-shadow:
        12px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 70%, transparent),
        0 12px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--warm) 70%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--ink);
      flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .value-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr;
      align-items: stretch;
    }

    .big-value {
      padding: 2rem;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 15%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 22%, transparent), transparent 18rem),
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 88%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent2) 42%, transparent);
    }

    .big-value h3 {
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3.8rem);
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }

    .big-value p {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1.05rem;
    }

    .metric-stack {
      display: grid;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .metric {
      padding: 1.25rem;
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg2) 88%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    }

    .metric strong {
      display: block;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-family: "Pixelify", monospace;
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
    }

    .metric span {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }

    .demo-timeline {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 1px;
      background: var(--rule);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    }

    .demo-item {
      padding: 1.35rem;
      min-height: 230px;
      background: var(--bg2);
    }

    .demo-item small {
      color: var(--accent2);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    }

    .demo-item h3 {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      font-size: 1.08rem;
    }

    .demo-item p {
      color: var(--muted);
      margin: 0.7rem 0 0;
      font-size: 0.94rem;
    }

    .final-cta {
      padding: 5rem 0 6rem;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .final-cta .logo {
      font-family: "Pixelify", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 7rem);
      line-height: 0.9;
      color: var(--accent);
      text-shadow: 0 0 34px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 34%, transparent);
    }

    .final-cta p {
      width: min(760px, 100%);
      margin: 1rem auto 0;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }

    .terminal-line {
      display: inline-block;
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow) 78%, transparent);
      border: 1px solid var(--rule);
      font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .hero,
      .section-head,
      .solution-band,
      .value-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .room-wrap {
        min-height: 520px;
      }

      .room {
        transform: scale(0.8) rotateX(58deg) rotateZ(-38deg);
      }

      .grid.cols-4,
      .grid.cols-3,
      .flow,
      .demo-timeline {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .page {
        width: min(100% - 24px, 1180px);
      }

      .hero {
        padding-top: 2rem;
      }

      h1 {
        font-size: clamp(3.3rem, 20vw, 5rem);
      }

      .room-wrap {
        min-height: 420px;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .room {
        transform: scale(0.62) rotateX(58deg) rotateZ(-38deg);
      }

      .floating-terminal {
        position: relative;
        right: auto;
        bottom: auto;
        width: 100%;
        margin-top: -3rem;
      }

      .grid.cols-4,
      .grid.cols-3,
      .grid.cols-2,
      .flow,
      .demo-timeline {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .section {
        padding: 3.5rem 0;
      }

      .statement,
      .big-value {
        padding: 1.4rem;
      }
    }

    @media print {
      body {
        background: var(--bg);
      }

      body::before,
      body::after,
      .room-wrap {
        display: none;
      }

      .hero {
        min-height: auto;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .section {
        break-inside: avoid;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <main class="page">
    <section class="hero" id="top">
      <div>
        <div class="badge">TRAE AI 创造力大赛 · Creative Showcase</div>
        <h1>AgentJam</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">在 Minecraft 里多人协作的 <strong>AI 编程空间</strong></p>
        <p class="summary">
          AgentJam 把 AI 编程协作搬进一个共享的 3D 房间：每个人拥有自己的 AI agent 工位，中央项目墙实时展示代码变更、运行页面、任务状态与历史快照，让团队从“各自召唤 AI”变成“同处一室共创”。
        </p>
        <div class="minecraft-hud" aria-label="我的世界风格状态栏">
          <div class="status-row">
            <span class="hearts" aria-label="团队状态"><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span><span>♥</span></span>
            <span class="hunger" aria-label="算力储备"><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span><span>◆</span></span>
            <span>XYZ: 128 / 64 / -32 · Biome: AI Hackathon Plains</span>
          </div>
          <div class="hotbar">
            <div class="slot active">AI<br>Agent</div>
            <div class="slot">语音<br>指令</div>
            <div class="slot">终端</div>
            <div class="slot">Diff</div>
            <div class="slot">预览</div>
            <div class="slot">测试</div>
            <div class="slot">快照</div>
            <div class="slot">红石<br>同步</div>
            <div class="slot">回滚</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-actions">
          <a class="pill primary" href="#solution">进入协作空间</a>
          <a class="pill" href="#demo">查看 Demo 计划</a>
          <a class="pill" href="#features">核心能力</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="room-wrap" aria-label="Minecraft 风格的多人 AI 编程房间示意">
        <div class="room">
          <div class="floor"></div>
          <div class="wall">
            <div class="screen a"></div>
            <div class="screen b"></div>
            <div class="screen c"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="station one" data-agent="Agent A"></div>
          <div class="station two" data-agent="Agent B"></div>
          <div class="station three" data-agent="Agent C"></div>
          <div class="avatar v1"></div>
          <div class="avatar v2"></div>
          <div class="avatar v3"></div>
          <div class="beam b1"></div>
          <div class="beam b2"></div>
          <div class="beam b3"></div>
          <div class="crafting-table" aria-label="工作台：把想法合成为功能"></div>
          <div class="portal-frame" aria-label="下界传送门：进入共享项目空间"></div>
          <div class="ore-block" aria-label="钻石矿：高价值代码变更"></div>
          <div class="creeper" aria-label="苦力怕：提示代码冲突风险"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="floating-terminal">
          <div><span>$</span> voice: “让登录页支持 GitHub OAuth”</div>
          <div><span>agent/a</span> editing auth.ts</div>
          <div><span>wall</span> preview updated · tests running</div>
          <div><span>snapshot</span> saved: hackathon-demo-v4</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="pain">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Problem</p>
          <h2>AI 写得越来越快，团队却越来越难同步。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          当每个人都能指挥 AI agent 快速改代码，传统协作链路会被加速放大：分支、PR、截图、聊天记录和本地运行结果散落在不同工具里，团队很难知道“谁让 AI 做了什么、现在跑到了哪一步、哪里会冲突”。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="grid cols-4">
        <article class="card pain-card">
          <h3>上下文割裂</h3>
          <p>需求在聊天里，代码在分支里，运行结果在截图里，AI 的推理过程又藏在个人会话中。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card pain-card">
          <h3>版本混乱</h3>
          <p>多个 agent 同时修改项目，冲突往往到合并时才暴露，修复成本被推迟放大。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card pain-card">
          <h3>过程不可见</h3>
          <p>团队成员只看到结果，不知道任务状态、修改意图、测试进度和失败原因。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card pain-card">
          <h3>协作不具象</h3>
          <p>远程黑客松和教学场景缺少“同处一个工作室”的空间感与参与感。</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="solution">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Solution</p>
          <h2>把多人 AI 编程变成可看见、可参与、可回放的空间共创。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          AgentJam 像 <mark class="key">Google Docs for code</mark>，但它是 spatial、voice-driven、AI-powered：每个工位都是一个可指挥的 agent，每次修改都会投射到中央项目墙，所有人共享同一个实时语境。
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="solution-band">
        <div class="statement">
          <p>从“异步合并代码”升级为“在同一个 3D 房间里实时共创软件”。</p>
        </div>
        <div class="mini-map" aria-label="AgentJam 空间协作结构图">
          <div class="line l1"></div>
          <div class="line l2"></div>
          <div class="line l3"></div>
          <div class="line l4"></div>
          <div class="node center">中央<br>项目墙</div>
          <div class="node n1">语音<br>指令</div>
          <div class="node n2">AI<br>工位</div>
          <div class="node n3">代码<br>Diff</div>
          <div class="node n4">运行<br>预览</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="minecraft-elements">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Minecraft Elements</p>
          <h2>不是贴皮，而是把协作逻辑做成方块世界。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          页面中的“我的世界”元素都对应 AgentJam 的产品能力：方块代表模块化任务，红石代表实时同步，工作台代表功能合成，传送门代表进入共享项目空间，苦力怕代表冲突风险提示。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="grid cols-3">
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon grass"></div>
          <h3>草方块房间</h3>
          <p>把代码仓库具象成一个可进入、可走动、可观察的 3D 协作基地。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon redstone"></div>
          <h3>红石同步线路</h3>
          <p>象征实时事件流：代码变更、任务状态、测试日志和预览更新同步投射到项目墙。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon craft"></div>
          <h3>工作台式共创</h3>
          <p>成员把需求、提示词、代码片段和 AI agent 能力合成为可运行的功能。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon diamond"></div>
          <h3>钻石矿变更</h3>
          <p>关键代码产出被高亮标记，方便团队快速识别最有价值的修改与 Demo 亮点。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon portal"></div>
          <h3>项目传送门</h3>
          <p>从本地工具、仓库或课堂入口一键进入共享空间，降低协作启动成本。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card mc-element">
          <div class="block-icon creeper-face"></div>
          <h3>苦力怕冲突预警</h3>
          <p>当多个 agent 可能踩到同一片代码区域，系统用空间化警示提前暴露风险。</p>
        </article>
      </div>

    </section>

    <section class="section" id="flow">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Workflow</p>
          <h2>一次协作，从进入房间开始。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          AgentJam 的流程不是让团队学习一个新项目管理工具，而是把现有的“沟通、改代码、跑页面、看状态、回滚快照”压缩进一个共享空间。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="flow">
        <article class="step">
          <h3>创建房间</h3>
          <p>选择项目仓库，生成一个 Minecraft 风格协作房间，团队成员以角色身份进入。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="step">
          <h3>占用工位</h3>
          <p>每个人绑定自己的 AI agent 工位，明确当前负责模块和任务边界。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="step">
          <h3>发出指令</h3>
          <p>通过语音或终端描述意图，例如“修复注册表单校验并补测试”。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="step">
          <h3>投射变更</h3>
          <p>中央项目墙实时展示 Diff、预览页、测试状态、任务流和冲突提醒。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="step">
          <h3>保存快照</h3>
          <p>团队在关键节点保存历史快照，可回放、对比、恢复或用于展示复盘。</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="features">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Core Features</p>
          <h2>为 AI 时代重新设计“同一个项目”。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          核心功能围绕一个目标展开：让 AI agent 的工作不再只存在于个人窗口，而是成为团队可以共同观察、介入和协调的空间事件。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="grid cols-3">
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">01</div>
          <h3>个人 AI Agent 工位</h3>
          <p>每个成员拥有独立工位，可绑定模型、任务上下文、终端会话与代码编辑权限。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">02</div>
          <h3>语音 + 终端双入口</h3>
          <p>轻量任务用语音快速派发，复杂任务通过终端精确控制，适配不同开发习惯。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">03</div>
          <h3>中央项目墙</h3>
          <p>集中显示代码 Diff、任务看板、运行预览、日志、测试结果和关键决策。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">04</div>
          <h3>实时冲突感知</h3>
          <p>当多个 agent 修改同一模块，系统用空间提示和墙面标记提前暴露风险。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">05</div>
          <h3>历史快照回放</h3>
          <p>把每次重要变更保存为可回放节点，让黑客松展示和教学复盘更直观。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card feature">
          <div class="icon">06</div>
          <h3>多人临场感</h3>
          <p>角色位置、工位状态和项目墙反馈共同构成“大家正在一起造东西”的体验。</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="users">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Users</p>
          <h2>适合需要高速共创的软件团队。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          AgentJam 的目标用户不是单纯“写代码的人”，而是那些需要在短时间内共享上下文、快速试错、共同交付结果的人。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="grid cols-4">
        <article class="card audience-card">
          <div class="top">
            <div class="avatar-block"></div>
            <h3>黑客松团队</h3>
          </div>
          <p>在 24 到 48 小时内快速分工、同步进展、展示构建过程，而不是只展示最终页面。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card audience-card">
          <div class="top">
            <div class="avatar-block"></div>
            <h3>AI 开发者</h3>
          </div>
          <p>同时调度多个 agent，清楚看到每个 agent 的任务边界、执行状态与产出质量。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card audience-card">
          <div class="top">
            <div class="avatar-block"></div>
            <h3>创业团队</h3>
          </div>
          <p>把产品、设计、工程与 AI 编码过程放在同一空间，减少远程协作的信息折损。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card audience-card">
          <div class="top">
            <div class="avatar-block"></div>
            <h3>编程教育</h3>
          </div>
          <p>老师能观察学生如何指挥 AI、如何调试、如何协作，而不仅仅检查最终代码。</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="value">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Value</p>
          <h2>AgentJam 的价值不是更快写代码，而是更快形成共识。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          当 AI agent 成为团队里的“超高速执行者”，真正稀缺的是共享上下文、协作秩序和过程透明。AgentJam 让团队围绕同一个空间对象工作，而不是围绕一堆散落链接工作。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="grid value-grid">
        <div class="big-value">
          <h3>Spatial Co-Creation for AI Coding</h3>
          <p>
            AgentJam 把代码仓库变成一个可进入的房间，把 PR 变成墙上的实时变化，把聊天同步变成面对同一个项目墙的协作。它让 AI 编程从单人生产力工具，升级为团队共创基础设施。
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-stack">
          <div class="metric">
            <strong>1 Room</strong>
            <span>把成员、AI、代码、预览和历史放进同一个协作语境。</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <strong>N Agents</strong>
            <span>每个成员都能拥有自己的 AI 工位，同时又能被团队看见和协调。</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <strong>∞ Replay</strong>
            <span>关键过程可回放，适合比赛展示、教学复盘和产品迭代追踪。</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section" id="demo">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div>
          <p class="eyebrow">Demo Plan</p>
          <h2>未来 Demo：做一个能真正“进房间协作”的原型。</h2>
        </div>
        <p>
          Demo 计划聚焦一个可感知的闭环：多人进入空间、分配 agent、发起代码任务、项目墙实时更新、保存并回放历史快照。
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="demo-timeline">
        <article class="demo-item">
          <small>Phase 01</small>
          <h3>3D 房间与角色</h3>
          <p>搭建 Minecraft 风格 Web 3D 房间，支持多人位置同步、工位占用和简单互动。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="demo-item">
          <small>Phase 02</small>
          <h3>Agent 工位联动</h3>
          <p>每个工位连接一个 AI 编程 agent，可通过终端指令触发项目修改任务。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="demo-item">
          <small>Phase 03</small>
          <h3>中央项目墙</h3>
          <p>实时展示 Diff、任务状态、运行页面和日志，把 agent 的执行过程变成公共画面。</p>
        </article>
        <article class="demo-item">
          <small>Phase 04</small>
          <h3>语音与快照</h3>
          <p>加入语音指挥、历史快照、回放和冲突提示，形成完整的比赛演示路径。</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="final-cta">
      <div class="logo">AgentJam</div>
      <p>让多人 AI 编程从“各自开 agent，然后努力合并”变成“在同一个空间里，一起看见、一起决定、一起创造”。</p>
      <div class="terminal-line">$ join room agentjam://hackathon-lab</div>
    </section>
  </main>
</body>
</html>

```
